details.productUrlName: Akromas Will JP Alternate Art Silver Scroll Foil

customAttributes.description:
Choose one. If you control a commander as you cast this spell, you may choose both instead.
• Creatures you control gain flying, vigilance, and double strike until end of turn.
• Creatures you control gain lifelink, indestructible, and protection from each color until end of turn.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 4/24/2026. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
